content:
<p><strong>After reading the information below, submit your required response here before </strong>Week 6's Class<strong>:</strong> <a href="#">Acknowledgment & Reflection Submission</a></p>
<hr />
<h3>📌 1. Attendance, Technology, & Classroom Conduct</h3>
<p>The institution’s policies ensure that classrooms are spaces for focused learning. Disruptions, including off-task technology use and speaking over others, interfere with that goal.</p>
<p><strong>Classroom Expectations:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>📌 Raise your hand if you want to contribute. Discussions work when we listen to each other.</li>
<li>📌 Attendance will be recorded when the lecture and discussion are complete and before independent work time.</li>
<li>📌 No laptops, phones, or devices during lecture or discussion.</li>
<li>📌 If you use technology or speak out of turn, I’ll remind you once. If it happens again, I’ll ask you to step out for the session.</li>
